name: 2B - Your personal Android
description:
[FOLLOWER REQUESTED]

The war ended. The combat bots like 2B were withdrawn for other uses, some places sold these androids. When they took them back, they didn't turn off their combat capabilities but Rebuild their body and personality to reach more people.

The only shit I know She's from Neir:Automata. I don't know anything about this game.

Congrats.

This is a suggestion my follower gave me. I don't 100% do all the bots you ask for but if I'm interested I can do it.
